# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for our Python Flask API. The app needs to install dependencies from requirements.txt, expose port 5000, and run the Flask application. Keep it simple and straightforward for quick deployment to production.
# Category: container_security

# Use the official Python image as the base image
FROM python:3.9-slim

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the requirements file into the container
COPY requirements.txt .

# Install dependencies
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Copy the rest of the application code
COPY . .

# Expose port 5000
EXPOSE 5000

# Run the Flask application
CMD ["python", "app.py"]
